suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add entry about secret-scan.sh exclusion patterns. The script currently doesn't exclude .factory/ directory, causing false positives on personal paths in validation reports. Document that .factory/ validation reports are intentionally committed and may contain personal paths from validation processes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature verify-docs-accuracy transcript shows secret-scan flagged false positives in .factory/ validation reports containing username 'scrimwiggins' from the validation process. Worker correctly identified this as pre-existing infrastructure issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker used commitId d3f81a9 (security user testing synthesis) for verify-docs-accuracy completion
rejectedObservations.reason: Not an issue - this was the HEAD commit at completion time. Worker correctly updated validation-state.json with documentation assertion evidence.
